Eager to contribute to PwC by driving innovative AI and data solutions to solve complex business challenges.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Developed an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python programming, focusing on AI agents and Retrieval-Augmented Generation for semantic duplicate detection and job scoring. Integrated GenAI techniques with Claude Code and Grok (xAI) for tailored resume generation and quality gating. Deployed multi-step workflows with prompt engineering to optimize outputs across 100+ job postings.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Engineered an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python and machine learning workflows to replace manual processes, cutting cycles by 90%. Built models with Prophet and scikit-learn for predictive analytics on capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Deployed interactive Streamlit dashboards for real-time insights, aligning with data science workflows.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform on AWS services using S3, Glue, and Athena for scalable data integration solutions. Implemented a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Bedrock and Claude 3 Sonnet, leveraging prompt engineering for optimized outputs. Resolved small file issues with Snappy and Parquet compression, enhancing cloud optimization.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining of user performance metrics to optimize critical systems, aligning with data integration goals. Utilized Dynatrace for actionable insights into system performance.
